positive: A symmetrical, intricate mandala featuring bioluminescent cosmic flora and fauna. The central element is a stylized, graceful celestial guardian creature (like an ethereal owl or moth) intertwined with swirling galaxies and geometric patterns. Style: Neo-Art Nouveau meets Cosmic Minimalism. Composition: Perfectly centered, highly detailed, suitable for repeat tiling on apparel. Strong contrast between deep sapphire blues, emerald greens, and glowing aquamarine accents. Lighting: Volumetric, soft glow emanating from the flora. Outline: Clean, sharp, vector-like silhouette effect. Print-ready, isolated on a clean background.
negative: blurry, grainy, noisy, text, watermark, signature, logo, low detail, extra limbs, bad anatomy, distorted, asymmetrical, poorly drawn
